zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Hungerford於1472年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾海斯波利時，他的父親Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford31歲，母親Jane Bulstrode26歲。他於大約1500年與Jane de la Zouche結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1521年1月24日在英國維爾爾海斯波利享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾海斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Hungerford于1472年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾海斯波利时，他的父亲Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford31岁，母亲Jane Bulstrode26岁。他于大约1500年与Jane de la Zouche结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1521年1月24日在英国維爾爾海斯波利享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾海斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Hungerford was born in 1472, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford, was 31 and his mother, Jane Bulstrode, was 26. He married Jane de la Zouche about 1500. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 24 January 1521, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Hungerford est né en 1472, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jane Bulstrode, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jane de la Zouche environ 1500. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 24 janvier 1521, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Hungerford 1472 in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford 31 und seine Mutter Jane Bulstrode 26. Er hat um 1500 Jane de la Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 24. Januar 1521 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Hungerford è nato il nel 1472 nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Jane Bulstrode, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jane de la Zouche circa 1500. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 gennaio 1521, nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Hungerfordが1472年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerfordは31歳，母Jane Bulstrodeは26歳であった。約1500年にJane de la Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1521年1月24日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Hungerford(이)가 1472년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Bulstrode(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1500년 Jane de la Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1521년 1월 24일 영국 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Hungerford nasceu em 1472, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Jane Bulstrode, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane de la Zouche aproximadamente 1500. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1521, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Hungerford родился в 1472 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Bulstrode, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane de la Zouche около 1500 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 24 января 1521 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Hungerford nació en 1472, en Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Jane Bulstrode, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jane de la Zouche aproximadamente 1500. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de enero de 1521, en Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
